name: claude-code-proxy
description: The Claude/Anthropic proxy layer (anthropicProfile) on top of the generic core-proxy engine
author: intisy

scripts.build: npm --prefix core-proxy/core-ir install && npm --prefix core-proxy/core-ir run build && npm --prefix core-ir install && npm --prefix core-ir run build && node core-proxy/teavm-build.mjs --java-dir java --module :claude-code-proxy-teavm --out src/generated/anthropic-rate-limit.teavm.js && npx tsc --project core-proxy/tsconfig.json --types node && npx tsc && node build.mjs
